crutches.name: AGENTS.md Do-Not-Touch Zone Guard
crutches.description: Staged files in AGENTS.md do-not-touch zones must have a WORKLOG.md row

crutches.name: Worklog Task-ID Guard
crutches.description: WORKLOG.md changes must include a V*- task ID in the diff

crutches.name: deny.toml Coordination Guard
crutches.description: .gitignore changes should be coordinated with deny.toml

crutches.name: CI Workflow SHA-Pin Guard
crutches.description: CI workflow actions must be SHA-pinned, not tag-pinned

crutches.name: Merge Conflict Marker Guard
crutches.description: Source files must not contain unresolved merge conflict markers
